title: Bluesky was launched as a Twitter rival — but it's far less popular. Now it's eyeing Reddit for inspiration
summary_full: "I think the public square is not the direction we want to go in...we're very inspired by companies like Reddit," Bluesky's Rose Wang told CNBC.
summary_public: "I think the public square is not the direction we want to go in...we're very inspired by companies like Reddit," Bluesky's Rose Wang told CNBC.
